rootNode.ResponseMSG: The parameterized query '(@AutoVoucherNo int,@CostClassId int,@CurRate float,@CurrencyId ' expects the parameter '@AutoManualNo', which was not supplied.

Data.ResponseMSG: The parameterized query '(@AutoVoucherNo int,@CostClassId int,@CurRate float,@CurrencyId ' expects the parameter '@AutoManualNo', which was not supplied.
